mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM menus WHERE id = #{menuId}

SELECT r.id, r.menu_id AS menuId, r.ingredient_id AS ingredientId, r.quantity, r.recipe, m.name AS menuName, i.name AS ingredientName, i.stock_qty AS currentStock, CASE WHEN i.stock_qty < i.min_stock THEN '부족' ELSE '정상' END AS stockStatus FROM recipes r LEFT JOIN menus m ON r.menu_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ingredients i ON r.ingredient_id = i.id WHERE r.menu_id = #{menuId} ORDER BY r.id

SELECT r.id, r.menu_id AS menuId, r.ingredient_id AS ingredientId, r.quantity, r.recipe, m.name AS menuName, i.name AS ingredientName, i.stock_qty AS currentStock, CASE WHEN i.stock_qty < i.min_stock THEN '부족' ELSE '정상' END AS stockStatus FROM recipes r LEFT JOIN menus m ON r.menu_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ingredients i ON r.ingredient_id = i.id ORDER BY m.name, r.id
SELECT id, name FROM menus ORDER BY name
SELECT id, name AS ingredientName, stock_qty AS currentStock FROM ingredients ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes (menu_id, ingredient_id, quantity, recipe) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{ingredientId}, #{quantity}, #{recipe})
